case_title: BELETE A. WORKE VS. PRIORITY PARKING-CA, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORKE, BELETE A. AS TO DEFENDANT PRIORITY PARKING-CA, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORKE, BELETE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRIORITY PARKING-CA, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $6,529.79 PRINCIPAL, $34.38 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,789.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
